creator: bmeyer@mesoft.com.au
text:
I did try to reach out directly to your freebsd email account.  

In short, yeah, you can tag me as the maintainer (I use the package a fair bit for stuff that we use but there are a few problems with it as it currently stands and it really does need a fair bit of attention).  

In regard to the other forks, yes ... I have looked at a few.  The problem with a lot of these things is that a lot of people have had different goes at merging various changes/patches.  

In most cases, people just use the parts that they need and adjust/fix what they need and bascially strip/ignore the rest.  It is a very pragmatic approach and there is nothing wrong with it (I know this as I have done this myself) but doesn't really solve the fundamental problems with the library.  

With the new year, it may be a good time to get off my a*** and actually try to merge a lot of this stuff and see what falls out.  

I've not been an official port maintainer before so this should prove to "interesting".
